Instructions for installing, running, and testing the Flaskr blog app from the Flask tutorial.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for setting up, running, and testing the `Flaskr` application, which is a basic blog app built using the Flask framework. It begins with guidance on cloning the correct version of the Flask repository and setting up a virtual environment to ensure dependencies are isolated. The document then details the installation process for `Flaskr`, including commands for both Unix-based systems and Windows. After installation, it explains how to initialize the database and run the application using Flask's command-line interface. Finally, it provides instructions for testing the application using `pytest`, including generating a coverage report to assess test coverage.
